First time playing horla, borrowed from friend.
Wtf why does she have everything at such low cost?! 1 cost aoe weakness? 1 cost aoe vulnerability? Giving aliemus at the cost of 0?
don't forget her strike also just makes everyone do more damage
I still don't understand her emotions gimmick, it stacks up to 3? Do I gain a stack each time I leap the same emotion? How much do I gain per stack? Exalt 250% is that forever? Does it stack?
All questions gtp will never answer
honestly idg how the rouse works etiher
The 250% is exactly what it says depending on what mood she's in she'll buff a part of her exalt by 250%
Idk, balancing wasn't in mind when creating her
okay so say you're in joy
Depending on her mood it buffs a part of her exalt
Joy buff aliemus so aliemus part of exalt gets buffed
because for taht same cost you could get the login bonus
Rouse is also simple, play rouse you get stacks for the moods you're not in immediately and you get another stack for them every round start
Oh it's exalt getting buff not the emotions
When you switch to that mood it eats that mood's stacks to do an effect
the effect in question gets buffed by 250% of the effect of the mood
What effect each stack does from each mood is listed in the rouse
if you pay for the monthly each day is enough silver to buy a pull so that's 30 pulls + a refund of 300 for the cost of the subscription
For example switching to sad with stacks from rouse built up will give you a heal depending on the stacks, etc.
If you've already played rouse it'll show up on the card too, like switch to sad heal x hp
So I stay in joy, gain 3 layers and switch to anger on turn 5?
It's a nice incentive to switch but still not necessary
Anger's boost is also just more hits on her rhapsody instead of a crit buff

r u trying to do story?
if u r doing story u can go ahead and use R wheels
the R wheels are mostly exploration focused
(some stage only has boss battle, so u may want to swap for those)

my most recommended R wheels effects are:
+1 relic in store (1 being cursed)
-5 store reset cost, +1 reset limit per store
remove up to 3 symptom cards in rest area (forces 3 if u have some u want to keep as well), +20 black sigils
+5% Death resist per black sigil when entering boss battle

my fav cursed relic is cursed jade, which gives +75 black sigil per battle and 1 symptom card. its trash when theres only 1-2 mobs though
others are useful too but these 4 are my most used
